enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night catch-up vlog (at 5:42am on Dec 25) covering the past couple days: he skipped website work due to stress, mounted a TV in his room, discovered the clubhouse lap pool and considered adding swimming to his routine, and is excited about decorating his room for Christmas and his upcoming birthday.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Won't tolerate gaps; will backdate to fill them
Excited and treating it like a Christmas gift to himself
Wants to try lap swimming at the clubhouse pool
Acknowledges it affects his focus; considers cutting back during exercise

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is a perfectionist and doesn't miss a day of making videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is recording a video for December 23rd on December 25th to catch up on missed videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle didn't work on his website yesterday because he got up late due to being super stressed out the night before.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle overcooked himself with tiles the night before, which caused him to be super stressed out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle started working on his room and went to the hardware store to get supplies to mount the TV on the wall.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle didn't finish organizing his room but plans to work on it tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle had to take a shower at the clubhouse because his hot water wasn't working.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle noticed the lap pool in the clubhouse for the first time and thinks it's almost as long as the one at 24 Hour Fitness.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to start using the lap pool at the clubhouse.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks biking and working on his website will help him get in shape.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle wonders what his MP3 player would sound like underwater.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle doesn't pay much attention to what he listens to because he's so high.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle considers smoking less weed when he starts biking and using the pool.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is glad he came up with the idea to set up his room, even though it will cost him a lot of money.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to sell his car soon to cover the costs of setting up his room.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to show his room setup when it's finished, including lights and pictures.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle loves Christmas and considers this his favorite Christmas ever.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's birthday is two days after Christmas.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to work on organizing his room for his birthday instead of working on his website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is super excited to work on his website and the new setup for his bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's first project involves tracing outlines of cobblestones, which he thinks is an easy and perfect starting point.

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-Log.
I'll say this is for the 23rd because I don't want to miss a day
Because I'm anal like that.
I'm a perfectionist and I don't miss a day.
So even though it's the 25th, I'm going to say it's for the 23rd
So that I can do multiple videos in a day to catch back up to where I am.
And that wasn't my idea.
That was somebody else's idea.
Thank you for the idea.
So it's currently...
So I'm going to do this real quick and then go to sleep before it gets light out.
So since the last time I did a video, I...
So yeah, I didn't work at all on my website yesterday
Because I got up kind of late
Because I was like super stressed out.
I got myself super stressed out the night before
When I overcooked myself with those tiles.
So I got up a little bit late
But then I started working on my room.
I ran into my room and then I went into the hardware store
And got the stuff and put the TV on the wall
But I didn't finish and then I was organizing my room.
So anyway, I'll show when I'm done.
I'll work on it tomorrow.
I'm really looking forward to it.
I went...
I had to take a shower at the clubhouse today
Because my...
No water comes out of my hot water
And I decided to go up and look into the pool area in the clubhouse
And it's a great lap pool.
I never really noticed it.
It's got three painted lanes
And it's almost as long as the one I work at 24 Hour Fitness.
So I think I'm going to start...
That'd be cool to do that too
Because I have...
If I start getting into the biking,
Working on my website in the biking...
I can't work on the website in the pool
But if I'm biking, I'll be in shape
And maybe I'll be...
It'd be fun to do that
Because I have the MP3 player
And I want to see what it sounds like underwater.
That'd be cool if it's all like in your ear, you know?
Maybe you could like pay attention to it better.
Because I don't really pay attention to what I listen to
All that good right now
Because I'm so high.
Maybe I'll smoke less weed when I do that.
I don't know.
But yeah, so...
That's all I did yesterday.
It's definitely...
I'm definitely glad I came up with this idea.
I want to totally set up my room now
Even though it's going to put me into the...
Make me suck up all my money.
I'll just try to sell my car soon.
But yeah, when I do the squat thing there,
I'll show when I'm done
And get lights all over
And put pictures all over the place.
So yeah, it's super, super...
It's like Christmas.
But it is Christmas.
Today's Christmas.
Oh, I love it.
This is my favorite Christmas ever.
And definitely for my birthday.
My birthday is two days after Christmas.
I'm definitely going to work on organizing my room for my birthday.
Definitely not working on my website.
And then, yeah, I'm super excited.
I'll explain when I'm done.
But I'm super excited to work on my site
And the new way that I'm going to have my bike set up.
And then this first project that I'm working on,
Tracing outlines of the cobblestones,
Is so easy.
It's going to be perfect.
Perfect thing to start out with.
Okay, anyways, I'm going to hang up.
Peace out.
